## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests passed or the reason they were not run is documented.
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior/config changes.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, reports, backups, dumps or generated evidence were committed.
- [ ] No live provider apply was run.
- [ ] White-label naming checked.
- [ ] Security impact reviewed.
- [ ] Rollback/evidence impact reviewed.

## Notes

Mention any production go/no-go impact.
